## Summary

## Workorder

```text
workorders/YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM-by-githubusername-short-task-name.md
```

Or:

```text
Not workorder-driven: <small fix / cleanup / direct human request reason>
```

- [ ] `python -m pytest`

If a check was not run, say why.
